# Transformer

A neural network architecture based entirely on [[Self-Attention]]
mechanisms, introduced in [[Attention Is All You Need]].

The Transformer dispenses with recurrence and convolutions, using
[[Multi-Head Attention]] to model dependencies regardless of distance
in the input sequence.

## Impact

The Transformer architecture forms the basis of modern language models
including [[GPT]], [[BERT]], and their variants.
